---
title: "Members"
sidebar: people
toc: true
toc-location: right
page-layout: article
---

<style>
.member-feature {
  display: flow-root;
  margin-bottom: 2rem;
  padding-bottom: 1rem;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;
}

.member-feature-photo {
  float: left;
  width: 170px;
  max-width: 30%;
  margin: 0.2rem 1.25rem 0.75rem 0;
  border-radius: 8px;
  border: 1px solid #ddd;
}

.member-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(210px, 1fr));
  gap: 1.2rem;
  margin-top: 1rem;
  margin-bottom: 2rem;
}

.member-card {
  border: 1px solid #ddd;
  border-radius: 10px;
  padding: 1rem;
  background: #fff;
  text-align: center;
}

.member-photo,
.member-photo-placeholder {
  width: 130px;
  height: 130px;
  margin: 0 auto 0.75rem auto;
  border-radius: 8px;
  border: 1px solid #ddd;
  display: block;
}

.member-photo {
  object-fit: cover;
}

.member-photo-placeholder {
  background: #f3f3f3;
}

.member-card p {
  margin-bottom: 0;
}

.member-list li {
  margin-bottom: 0.35rem;
}
</style>


## Current Members

::: {.member-grid}

::: {.member-card}
![](images/thomas-girke.jpeg){.member-photo alt="Portrait of Thomas Girke"}
**Thomas Girke**  
Principal Investigator
:::

::: {.member-card}
![](images/brendan-gongol.jpeg){.member-photo alt="Portrait of Brendan Gongol"}
**Brendan Gongol**  
Postdoctoral Scholar
:::

::: {.member-card}
![](images/desmond-cairo.jpeg){.member-photo alt="Portrait of Desmond Cairo"}
**Desmond Cairo**  
Graduate Student, GGB
:::

::: {.member-card}
![](images/tandis-salem.jpg){.member-photo alt="Portrait of Tandis Salem"}
**Tandis Salem**  
Graduate Student, GGB
:::

::: {.member-card}
![](images/mohammad-afsharinia.jpg){.member-photo alt="Portrait of Mohammad Afsharinia"}
**Mohammad Afsharinia**  
Graduate Student, GGB
:::

::: {.member-card}
![](images/bigy-ambat.jpg){.member-photo alt="Portrait of Bigy Ambat"}
**Bigy Ambat**  
Graduate Student, GGB
:::

::: {.member-card}
![](images/kevin-horan.jpg){.member-photo alt="Portrait of Kevin Horan"}
**Kevin Horan**  
Postdoctoral Scholar
:::

::: {.member-card}
![](images/nathan-wang.jpg){.member-photo alt="Portrait of nathan Wang"}
**Nathan Wang**  
Undergraduate Student, Neurosciences
:::

::: {.member-card}
![](images/nina-phatak.jpg){.member-photo alt="Portrait of Nina Phatak"}
**Nina Phatak**  
Undergraduate Student, Bioengineering
:::

::: {.member-card}
![](images/yuzhu-duan.jpeg){.member-photo alt="Portrait of Yuzhu Duan"}
**Yuzhu Duan**  
Graduate Student, GGB
:::

::: {.member-card}
![](images/jianhai-zhang.jpg){.member-photo alt="Portrait of Jianhai Zhang"}
**Jianhai Zhang**  
Graduate Student, GGB
:::

::: {.member-card}
![](images/le-zhang.jpg){.member-photo alt="Portrait of Le Zhang"}
**Le Zhang**  
Graduate Student, GGB
:::

::: {.member-card}
![](images/austin-leong.jpg){.member-photo alt="Portrait of Austin Leong"}
**Austin Leong**  
Programmer
:::

::: {.member-card}
![](images/gordon-mosher.jpeg){.member-photo alt="Portrait of Gordon Mosher"}
**Gordon David Mosher**  
Undergraduate Student, Statistics
:::

::: {.member-card}
![](images/ponmathi-ramasamy.jpeg){.member-photo alt="Portrait of Ponmathi Ramasamy"}
**Ponmathi Ramasamy**  
Undergraduate Student, Bioengineering
:::

::: {.member-card}
![](images/maxwell-hom.jpg){.member-photo alt="Portrait of Maxwell Hom"}
**Maxwell Hom**  
Undergraduate Student
:::

::: {.member-card}
![](images/ryan-gates.jpg){.member-photo alt="Portrait of Ryan Gates"}
**Ryan Gates**  
Undergraduate Student
:::

:::

::: {.member-list}
- **Eric Guisa**
- **Sidd Lokray**


:::

## Alumni

### Former Postdoctoral Scholars

::: {.member-grid}

::: {.member-card}
![](images/daniela-cassol.jpeg){.member-photo alt="Portrait of Daniela Cassol"}
**Daniela Cassol**  
Postdoctoral Scholar, Bioinformatics
:::

::: {.member-card}
**Siddhartha Kanrar**  
Postdoctoral Scholar, Molecular Biology
:::

::: {.member-card}
**Pedro Rodrigues**  
Postdoctoral Scholar, Molecular Biology
:::

::: {.member-card}
**Varun Khanna**  
Postdoctoral Scholar, Cheminformatics
:::

::: {.member-card}
**Kei Iida**  
Postdoctoral Scholar, Bioinformatics
:::

:::

### Former Graduate Students

::: {.member-grid}

::: {.member-card}
![](images/tyler-backman.jpg){.member-photo alt="Portrait of Tyler Backman"}
**Tyler Backman**  
Graduate Student, Bioengineering
:::

::: {.member-card}
![](images/eddie-cao.jpg){.member-photo alt="Portrait of Yiqun Eddie Cao"}
**Yiqun Eddie Cao**  
Graduate Student, Computer Sciences
:::

::: {.member-card}
![](images/ergude-bao.jpeg){.member-photo alt="Portrait of Ergude Bao"}
**Ergude Bao**  
Graduate Student, Computer Sciences
:::

::: {.member-card}
![](images/anna-charisi.jpg){.member-photo alt="Portrait of Anna Charisi"}
**Anna Charisi**  
Graduate Student, Genetics, Genomics and Bioinformatics
:::

::: {.member-card}
**Yan Wang**  
Master Student, Computer Sciences
:::

:::

::: {.member-list}
- **Qiong Jia**
- **Shiyuan Guo**
- **Jisu Ha**
- **Anna Charisi**
- **Jorge Rodriguez**
- **Hua Tran**
:::

### Former Undergraduate Researchers and Staff

::: {.member-list}
- **Xinyang Li**
- **Siddharth Sai**
- **Cindy Nguyen**
- **Anna Alber**
- **Şeydanur Tıkır**
- **Patrick Tran**
- **John Sharifi**
- **Rebecca Sun**
- **Chris Webber**
- **Aleksandr Levchuk**
- **Lei Wang**
- **Junmei Liu**
- **Shawn Lesniak**
- **Julian Krause**
- **Li-Chang Cheng**
- **Christoph Sapper**
- **Ronly Schlenk**
- **Jack Cui**
:::
